problems.title: Mislabeled Structure — Non-Mutual Obligations
problems.description: The document is titled a "Mutual" NDA, but Section 3 on page 1 makes only Keystone's obligations binding — Solstice has none.

problems.title: Key Term Left Undefined
problems.description: Section 1 on page 1 never actually defines "Confidential Information," deferring to "the meaning customarily ascribed to it... to be finalized by legal."

problems.title: Unfilled Placeholder Field
problems.description: The Disclosing Party's address on page 1 is left as the placeholder "[ADDRESS TBD]".

problems.title: Effective Date Contradiction
problems.description: The Effective Date is stated as December 1, 2026, but the recitals on page 1 describe collaboration "since January 1, 2025" and the signature block is dated January 15, 2026 — before the stated Effective Date.

problems.title: Conflicting Term Lengths
problems.description: Section 4 (Term) says the agreement lasts 1 year, Section 10 (Survival) on page 3 says confidentiality survives 10 years, and Section 13 (Entire Agreement) says confidentiality is perpetual — three contradictory durations.

problems.title: Broken Section Cross-Reference
problems.description: Section 9 (Remedies) on page 3 references "Section 15," which doesn't exist — the document jumps from Section 14 to Section 16.

problems.title: Missing Governing Law Clause
problems.description: The document has no governing law or jurisdiction clause anywhere.

problems.title: Missing Signature Block
problems.description: Only Solstice's signature block appears on page 4 — Keystone's signature block is missing entirely.

problems.title: Inconsistent Party Name
problems.description: "Solstice Health Systems, Inc." in the preamble becomes "Solistice Health Systems" (misspelled, no entity suffix) in the signature block on page 4.

problems.title: Vague Confidentiality Exclusions
problems.description: Section 2 on page 1 is a single circular sentence — "Information that is not confidential is not covered" — with none of the standard carve-outs for prior knowledge, public domain, independent development, or third-party disclosure.

problems.title: Duplicate Section Numbering
problems.description: Two separate sections on page 2 are both labeled "Section 7" — one for IP Assignment and one for No Warranty.

problems.title: Non-NDA Scope Creep
problems.description: Sections 6 (Non-Competition) and 7 (IP Assignment) on page 2 don't belong in an NDA — they impose competitive restrictions and IP transfer obligations far beyond confidentiality.

problems.title: Spelling and Grammar Errors
problems.description: Spelling and grammar errors — "confidental," "herby," "recieve," "Aggreement" — are scattered throughout the document, including page 2.

problems.title: Uncapped One-Sided Indemnification
problems.description: Section 8 on page 3 requires Keystone to indemnify Solstice for "any and all losses whatsoever," with no cap and no fault qualifier, while Solstice owes nothing in return.

name: Harborview Retail Group - Vendor Contract Overview.pdf

problems.title: Section Requires Review
problems.description: A section on page 2 needs manual review before this document can be finalized.

problems.title: Unresolved Flag
problems.description: An automated flag raised on page 3 hasn't been addressed yet.

problems.title: Data Point Missing
problems.description: A required data point on page 1 was left blank.
